valid.name: create-table
valid.code: CREATE TABLE users (id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY);

invalid.name: rename-table
invalid.code: ALTER TABLE legacy_users RENAME TO users;

errors.message: `RENAME TO` breaks every running app that still queries the old name. The safer pattern is `CREATE VIEW old AS SELECT * FROM new` so old callers keep working until they're migrated, then drop the view in a separate deploy.
